name: @soltrade/profit-sweep
description: Profit Sweep orchestration (Gate D / D2): simulated, owner-bound, candidate-flagged. In-memory, deterministic. sweep_profits (admin) under profit_sweep_policy; manual records a candidate_sweep_event requiring simulated confirmation; auto/periodic are eligibility-only; reconciliation + provenance gates; append-only audit + events. No actual sweep; no token transfer; no tx build/sign/send; no KeyManager; no key material; no RPC; no DB; no rotation; no new asset_transfer_intents; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority; no UX/API/Opportunity-Radar exposure. candidate_ prefixes preserved.
